'''âf-s-l''' ('''kafasal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immolate|immolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immolate|immolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| kafasal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifasal|thifasal]] || [[word:jifasal|jifasal]] || [[word:shifasal|shifasal]] || [[word:kifasal|kifasal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufasal|thuthufasal]] || [[word:jujufasal|jujufasal]] || [[word:shushufasal|shushufasal]] || [[word:kukufasal|kukufasal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufasal|thufasal]] || [[word:jufasal|jufasal]] || [[word:shufasal|shufasal]] || [[word:kufasal|kufasal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufasal|thufasal]] || [[word:jufasal|jufasal]] || [[word:shufasal|shufasal]] || [[word:kufasal|kufasal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefasal|thefasal]] || [[word:jefasal|jefasal]] || [[word:shefasal|shefasal]] || [[word:kefasal|kefasal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofasal|thothofasal]] || [[word:jojofasal|jojofasal]] || [[word:shoshofasal|shoshofasal]] || [[word:kokofasal|kokofasal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofasal|thofasal]] || [[word:jofasal|jofasal]] || [[word:shofasal|shofasal]] || [[word:kofasal|kofasal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofasal|thofasal]] || [[word:jofasal|jofasal]] || [[word:shofasal|shofasal]] || [[word:kofasal|kofasal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfasal|thĂŠfasal]] || [[word:jĂŠfasal|jĂŠfasal]] || [[word:shĂŠfasal|shĂŠfasal]] || [[word:kĂŠfasal|kĂŠfasal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafasal|thathafasal]] || [[word:jajafasal|jajafasal]] || [[word:shashafasal|shashafasal]] || [[word:kakafasal|kakafasal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafasal|thafasal]] || [[word:jafasal|jafasal]] || [[word:shafasal|shafasal]] || [[word:kafasal|kafasal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafasal|thafasal]] || [[word:jafasal|jafasal]] || [[word:shafasal|shafasal]] || [[word:kafasal|kafasal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafasal|shafasal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafasal|goshafasal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafasal|gokishafasal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafasalnĂŒ|shafasalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafasalnknĂŒ|goshafasalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafasalnĂŒ|gokishafasalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafasalshĂ«|shafasalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafasalnkshĂ«|goshafasalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafasalshĂ«|gokishafasalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafasalro|shafasalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafasalnkro|goshafasalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafasalro|gokishafasalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafasalmu|shafasalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafasalnkmu|goshafasalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafasalmu|gokishafasalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafasalsher|shafasalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafasalnksher|goshafasalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafasalsher|gokishafasalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafasalng|shafasalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafasalnkng|goshafasalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafasalng|gokishafasalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafasalya|shafasalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafasalnkya|goshafasalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafasalya|gokishafasalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafasalyam|shafasalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafasalnkyam|goshafasalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafasalyam|gokishafasalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafasalnĂŒshĂ«|shafasalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafasalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafasalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafasalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafasalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafasalnĂŒro|shafasalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafasalnknĂŒro|goshafasalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafasalnĂŒro|gokishafasalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafasalnĂŒmu|shafasalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafasalnknĂŒmu|goshafasalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafasalnĂŒmu|gokishafasalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafasalshĂ«nĂŒ|shafasalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafasalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafasalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafasalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafasalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafasalshĂ«ro|shafasalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafasalnkshĂ«ro|goshafasalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafasalshĂ«ro|gokishafasalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafasalshĂ«mu|shafasalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafasalnkshĂ«mu|goshafasalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafasalshĂ«mu|gokishafasalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafasalronĂŒ|shafasalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafasalnkronĂŒ|goshafasalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafasalronĂŒ|gokishafasalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafasalroshĂ«|shafasalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafasalnkroshĂ«|goshafasalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafasalroshĂ«|gokishafasalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafasalromu|shafasalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafasalnkromu|goshafasalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafasalromu|gokishafasalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafasalmunĂŒ|shafasalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafasalnkmunĂŒ|goshafasalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafasalmunĂŒ|gokishafasalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafasalmushĂ«|shafasalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafasalnkmushĂ«|goshafasalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafasalmushĂ«|gokishafasalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafasalmuro|shafasalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafasalnkmuro|goshafasalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafasalmuro|gokishafasalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
